skills.name: Magic Arrow
skills.description: Creates a magical arrow or bolt that does extra damage and requires no ammunition

skills.name: Fire Arrow
skills.description: Imbues an arrow or bolt with fire damage

skills.name: Cold Arrow
skills.description: Adds cold damage to an arrow or bolt, slowing the target

skills.name: Multiple Shot
skills.description: Splits one arrow into multiple projectiles that spread out

skills.name: Exploding Arrow
skills.description: Enchants an arrow or bolt that explodes on contact, dealing fire damage to nearby enemies

skills.name: Ice Arrow
skills.description: Magically enhances an arrow to freeze the target on impact

skills.name: Guided Arrow
skills.description: Enchants an arrow or bolt to track its target unerringly

skills.name: Immolation Arrow
skills.description: Enchants an arrow that creates a pyre upon impact, burning enemies in the area

synergies.bonus: +5% Average Fire Damage per second per level

skills.name: Strafe
skills.description: Rapidly fires arrows at multiple nearby enemies

skills.name: Freezing Arrow
skills.description: Magically enhances an arrow or bolt to freeze entire groups of enemies on impact

skills.name: Jab
skills.description: Attacks with a series of rapid thrusts using a javelin or spear class weapon

skills.name: Power Strike
skills.description: Adds lightning damage to a javelin or spear attack

skills.name: Poison Javelin
skills.description: Throws a javelin that leaves a trail of poison clouds

skills.name: Impale
skills.description: A powerful attack that greatly increases damage but has increased weapon durability loss

skills.name: Lightning Bolt
skills.description: Converts a thrown javelin into a bolt of lightning

skills.name: Charged Strike
skills.description: Adds lightning damage to a melee attack and releases charged bolts on impact

skills.name: Plague Javelin
skills.description: Throws a javelin that releases expanding clouds of poison at the point of impact

skills.name: Fend
skills.description: Rapidly strikes several close targets with a spear or javelin

skills.name: Lightning Strike
skills.description: Adds lightning damage to a melee attack and releases chain lightning to nearby enemies

skills.name: Lightning Fury
skills.description: Throws a javelin that releases multiple lightning bolts that split on striking enemies

skills.name: Inner Sight
skills.description: Illuminates nearby enemies, reducing their defense rating

skills.name: Critical Strike
skills.description: Grants a chance to do double physical damage with attacks

skills.name: Dodge
skills.description: Grants a chance to dodge melee attacks while standing still or attacking

skills.name: Slow Missiles
skills.description: Slows the speed of all enemy missiles and ranged projectiles in the area

skills.name: Avoid
skills.description: Grants a chance to dodge missile attacks while standing still or attacking

skills.name: Penetrate
skills.description: Increases attack rating, providing additional chance to hit enemies

skills.name: Decoy
skills.description: Creates a duplicate image of the Amazon to distract nearby enemies

skills.name: Evade
skills.description: Grants a chance to dodge any attack while walking or running

skills.name: Valkyrie
skills.description: Summons a powerful Valkyrie warrior to fight by your side

skills.name: Pierce
skills.description: Grants a chance that missiles will pass through the target and continue onward

skills.name: Tiger Strike
skills.description: Consecutive hits add substantial damage bonuses to finishing moves

skills.name: Dragon Talon
skills.description: A powerful kick that releases charged-up bonuses and knocks back enemies

skills.name: Fists of Fire
skills.description: Consecutive hits add fire damage to finishing moves. Requires claw-class weapons

skills.name: Dragon Claw
skills.description: A dual claw attack that releases charged-up bonuses with both claws

skills.name: Cobra Strike
skills.description: Consecutive hits add life and mana stealing to finishing moves

skills.name: Claws of Thunder
skills.description: Consecutive hits add lightning damage to finishing moves. Requires claw-class weapons

skills.name: Dragon Tail
skills.description: An explosive kick that causes fire damage to the target and all nearby enemies

skills.name: Blades of Ice
skills.description: Consecutive hits add cold damage to finishing moves. Requires claw-class weapons

skills.name: Dragon Flight
skills.description: Teleport to a target enemy and deliver a devastating kick

skills.name: Phoenix Strike
skills.description: Consecutive hits charge up meteor, chain lightning, and chaos ice bolt for finishing moves

synergies.bonus: +10% Fire Damage, +6% Fire DPS per level

skills.name: Claw Mastery
skills.description: Improves damage, attack rating, and critical strike chance with claw-class weapons

skills.name: Psychic Hammer
skills.description: Uses mental power to create a psychic blast that damages and knocks back enemies

skills.name: Burst of Speed
skills.description: Temporarily increases attack speed and movement speed

skills.name: Weapon Block
skills.description: Grants a chance to block attacks when wielding two claw-class weapons

skills.name: Cloak of Shadows
skills.description: Casts a shadow cloak that blinds nearby enemies and reduces their defense

skills.name: Fade

skills.description: Summons a shadow of yourself that mimics your last-used skills

skills.name: Mind Blast
skills.description: Stuns a group of enemies and has a chance to convert them to fight for you

skills.name: Venom
skills.description: Temporarily adds poison damage to all weapon attacks

skills.name: Shadow Master
skills.description: Summons a powerful shadow that independently chooses and uses skills

skills.name: Fire Blast
skills.description: Throws an explosive fire bomb that damages nearby enemies

skills.name: Shock Web

skills.name: Blade Sentinel

skills.name: Death Sentry
skills.description: A trap that shoots lightning bolts and can explode nearby corpses

skills.name: Bash

skills.name: Leap

skills.name: Double Throw

skills.name: Leap Attack
skills.description: Leaps to and attacks a target enemy in one swift assault

skills.name: Concentrate

skills.name: Frenzy

skills.description: A powerful magical attack that converts all damage to magic but reduces defense to zero

skills.name: Spear Mastery

skills.name: Increased Stamina
skills.description: Passively increases maximum stamina and stamina recovery rate

skills.description: Passively increases the Barbarian's defense rating

skills.name: Increased Speed
skills.description: Passively increases walk and run speed

skills.description: Passively increases resistance to fire, cold, lightning, and poison damage

skills.name: Howl
skills.description: Sends nearby monsters fleeing in fear

skills.description: Use on a corpse for a chance to find a healing, mana, or rejuvenation potion

skills.name: Taunt
skills.description: Enrages a monster into attacking you at melee range, reducing its damage and improving your attack rating against it

skills.name: Find Item
skills.description: Use on a corpse for a chance to find additional items

skills.name: Battle Cry
skills.description: Reduces the defense and damage of all nearby enemies

skills.name: Battle Orders
skills.description: Increases maximum life, mana, and stamina for you and your party

skills.name: War Cry

skills.name: Firestorm
skills.description: Unleashes multiple waves of fire that scorch enemies in a line

skills.name: Molten Boulder
skills.description: Launches a boulder of flaming magma that knocks back and damages enemies

skills.description: Blasts a continuous jet of ice that damages enemies with frost

skills.description: Summons a meteor shower that rains fiery destruction on nearby enemies

skills.name: Lycanthropy

skills.name: Werebear

skills.name: Fury

skills.name: Raven

skills.name: Oak Sage

skills.name: Carrion Vine
skills.description: Summons a vine that consumes corpses to replenish your life

skills.name: Heart of Wolverine

skills.name: Summon Dire Wolf

skills.name: Solar Creeper

skills.name: Summon Grizzly

skills.name: Weaken

skills.name: Salvation

skills.name: Might
